Shahbaz Ahmad Assistant Advocat٤ General, Punjab Through this constitutional petition, the petitioner has called in question order dated 1612 2OI7 passed by the District and Sessions Judge, Faisalabad as Court of Protection ( Court of Protection consuituted under the Mental Health Ordinance, 2OOI (Ordinance whereby the Court of Protection accepted the application filed by Muhammad Iqbal responcent No2 and recalled its earlier order dated 24 O62OI6 whereby the petitioner was appointed as guardian ofrespondent No 2 who was stated to be suffering from mental disorder The brief facts of the case are that the petitioner filed an application with the Court of Protection secking 10 b appointed as guardian of respondent No 2 stating therein that respondent No2 suffers from mental and psychiatrie disease and is not in position to manage himself and his affairs Alongwith the said application ٠دلا ٨ ٥٥ ٣ ألتنمنة he produced medical certificates issued by the Board of Psychiatrists of Combined Military Hospital (CMH) Okara dated 2j U62OI4 und ulso by District Assessment Board of Social Welfare Women Development and Bait ul-Maal Department dated 25.09.2013 showing respondent No 2 as mentally incapacitated person, who 5٧!T!5 from schizophrenia The Court of Protection appointed the petitioner as guardian of the respondent No.2 vid٤ order dated 24,06.2016.

Form No HCJD C-12I ORDLRSHEEI ITHE LAHORE HIGH COURT LAHORE JUDICIAL DEPARTMENT Writ Petition No.126598 of 2UI7 Muhammad Riaz ASJ etc 5,No, 0f Date of Order with signature of Judge and thar of parties or Orcer Order counsel where necessary Proeceding proceeding 26.12.20!7 Mr Obaid Hassan Gondal Advocate for petitioner MMت. Shahbaz Ahmad Assistant Advocat٤ General, Punjab Through this constitutional petition, the petitioner has called in question order dated 1612 2OI7 passed by the District and Sessions Judge, Faisalabad as Court of Protection ( Court of Protection consuituted under the Mental Health Ordinance, 2OOI (Ordinance whereby the Court of Protection accepted the application filed by Muhammad Iqbal responcent No2 and recalled its earlier order dated 24 O62OI6 whereby the petitioner was appointed as guardian ofrespondent No 2 who was stated to be suffering from mental disorder The brief facts of the case are that the petitioner filed an application with the Court of Protection secking 10 b appointed as guardian of respondent No 2 stating therein that respondent No2 suffers from mental and psychiatrie disease and is not in position to manage himself and his affairs Alongwith the said application ٠دلا ٨ ٥٥ ٣ ألتنمنة he produced medical certificates issued by the Board of Psychiatrists of Combined Military Hospital (CMH) Okara dated 2j U62OI4 und ulso by District Assessment Board of Social Welfare Women Development and Bait ul-Maal Department dated 25.09.2013 showing respondent No 2 as mentally incapacitated person, who 5٧!T!5 from schizophrenia The Court of Protection appointed the petitioner as guardian of the respondent No.2 vid٤ order dated 24,06.2016. Thereafter, respondent No 2 himself filed an application with Court of Protection to recall the its earlier order dated 2-.06.2016 the ground that Ihe Saine had becn obtained on the basis of fraud and concealment of facts submitting false an0 fabricated documents an٥ medical reports The Court of Protection vide order dnted I6.I2 20I7 recalled the earlier orcer dated 24.06.2016 and cancelled the guardianship cenificate of person and property of respondent No 2 issued in I٧0٧5د Of the petitioner The petitioner has called in question the afore relerred orcer dated 16,12.2017 through this constitutional petition The leamed counsel for the petitioner has argued that Court of Protection after appointing the petitioner us guardian of respondent No 2 had become Junctus oyjicto ٠ ، ٠٠٠٧٨ ٠٠ ا، ا - ٥٨٥ not recall its earlier order Besides, the medical report issued by Board is not proper as respondunl No has not been kept under observation and without his personal examination and keeping him under observation, medical repon could n0t be issued. Moreover respondent N0.2 suffer3 from schizophrenia and is not in position to maintin himself therefore, the order passed by Court of Protection recall its earlier order is without any lawful authority and legal justification The learned Assistant Advocate General Punjab on Court s call has supported the legal position that the Court of Protection in order to do justice could recall its carlier order Ifthe cireumstancus so demanded Heard Record perused The petitioner is the brother of respondent No2 claims tnat respondent No,2 patient schizophrenia and has beun so declared by the Board of Psychiatrists Combined Military Hospital (CMH) Okara on 23.062O14 and also by Distict Assessment Board of Social Welfare, Women Development and Bait ul Maal Department on 25.09,2013 The petitioner has relied upon crtificates issue٥ the afore -refered authorities in support of his claim Keeping in view the c0٧l٥

Thereafter, respondent No 2 himself filed an application with Court of Protection to recall the its earlier order dated 2-.06.2016 the ground that Ihe Saine had becn obtained on the basis of fraud and concealment of facts submitting false an0 fabricated documents an٥ medical reports The Court of Protection vide order dnted I6.I2 20I7 recalled the earlier orcer dated 24.06.2016 and cancelled the guardianship cenificate of person and property of respondent No 2 issued in I٧0٧5د Of the petitioner The petitioner has called in question the afore relerred orcer dated 16,12.2017 through this constitutional petition The leamed counsel for the petitioner has argued that Court of Protection after appointing the petitioner us guardian of respondent No 2 had become Junctus oyjicto ٠ ، ٠٠٠٧٨ ٠٠ ا، ا - ٥٨٥ not recall its earlier order Besides, the medical report issued by Board is not proper as respondunl No has not been kept under observation and without his personal examination and keeping him under observation, medical repon could n0t be issued. Moreover respondent N0.2 suffer3 from schizophrenia and is not in position to maintin himself therefore, the order passed by Court of Protection recall its earlier order is without any lawful authority and legal justification The learned Assistant Advocate General Punjab on Court s call has supported the legal position that the Court of Protection in order to do justice could recall its carlier order Ifthe cireumstancus so demanded Heard Record perused The petitioner is the brother of respondent No2 claims tnat respondent No,2 patient schizophrenia and has beun so declared by the Board of Psychiatrists Combined Military Hospital (CMH) Okara on 23.062O14 and also by Distict Assessment Board of Social Welfare, Women Development and Bait ul Maal Department on 25.09,2013 The petitioner has relied upon crtificates issue٥ the afore -refered authorities in support of his claim Keeping in view the c0٧l٥ تممامسظنا اممنم afore-refered certificates, the Court Protection appointed the petitioner as guardian of respondent No.2 Person und properly vide 0rd٤٢ dnted 2-,06.20!6. From the said order, أt is not apparent wheiner respondent No 2 or his any other relative was associated with the proecedings or not Rather it appears Laut petitioner ٥nly impleaded large respondent without impleading the respondent No 2 his any other relative Therefore it appears that the order dated 24.062016 has been passed without providing opportunity of hearing to the respondent No. UF olher family members Ever court or functionary ؟١٨١ supposed to function in good faith honestly and within the precincts of its power that person concemed should be treated in accordance with Iaw and rights guaranteed by Articla Constitution Which included principles of natural justice, procedural fairess and proceedural propriety action which was mala Jide or colourable or order passed withou opporunity of hearing was not regarded as action in accordance with ١،٦ Reliance may be placed on س ظ لظللء لکا DlrucIor فف ککساسککا Ielepione Indusies CLPakistan (2OIS SCMR فففسع Thus the order dated 24.D62O16 was hit by the reluting publie Public Anj 1257).
